sapientinc/HRM ·GitHub ⭐ 12357 Python · Hierarchical-Reasoning, ARC-AGI, Logic-Models, Recurrent-Neural-Networks, Tiny-AI

What it is

A highly lightweight recurrent AI model simulating System 1/System 2 thinking solving intricate logic tasks dynamically without explicit Chain-of-Thought prompting naturally.

Problems solved

  • Substitutes extraordinarily brittle and token-heavy Chain-of-Thought LLM mechanics explicitly providing deterministic goal-execution utilizing multi-tier computational modules massively lowering parameter demands systematically.

How to get started

Allocate CUDA environments running FlashAttention natively mapping /pretrain.py executing exactly onto the sudoku-extreme-1k parameters verifying explicit inference outputs manually.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

The Hierarchical Reasoning Model posits an inherently divergent artificial intelligence paradigm prioritizing abstract sequential depth reasoning structurally replacing generic language correlations emphasizing mathematically provable execution natively.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Scaling LLMs structurally hits diminishing returns demanding exponentially larger context windows evaluating generic data. HRM bypasses this gracefully operating efficiently across only 27 million parameters accurately achieving state-of-the-art ARC-AGI validation without generalized pre-training architectures absolutely.

3. Technical Architecture

Exhibits robust bidirectional structural logic allocating specifically dual recurrent blocks. The high-level module isolates slow abstract planning heuristics driving implicitly underlying low-level modules calculating exact mathematical state functions continuously.

4. Core Implementation

Calculates iterative tensor updates enforcing mathematically rigorous forward propagations explicitly solving constraints implicitly dynamically. Replaces textual inference arrays evaluating concrete numeric state environments systematically over strict halting conditions efficiently simulating reasoning cycles flawlessly.

5. Code Organization

Orchestrated explicitly executing PyTorch DDP scripts targeting dataset generation architectures natively explicitly tracking inference cycles explicitly utilizing intricate Weights & Biases telemetry matrices comprehensively.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Download exactly the dataset/build_sudoku_dataset.py variables generating synthetic testing environments validating specifically training loops explicitly confirming logic matrices convergences directly evaluating limited batch dimensions cleanly.

7. Summary

A phenomenally intriguing empirical thesis validating structurally profound neural network logic architectures optimizing drastically computational requirements demonstrating implicitly reasoning capabilities securely executing extraordinarily efficiently.
